accurate.why: Accurately describes the act as expanding the scope of the MCH Block Grant to include stillbirth prevention research and activities.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; MCH Services Block Grant is the accurate name for the program under Title V.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the act's purpose as expanding the MCH Block Grant for stillbirth prevention.

changes_to_existing_law.why: States that the act expands the scope of the block grant, capturing the statutory change.

effective_dates.why: No separate effective date was specified; omitting it is fine.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the essential effect at a high level.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the Maternal and Child Health Services Block Grant.
